testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify team search functionality
steps: Verification: Expect search results to contain 'Toronto Maple Leafs'
expected: Search results are displayed for the specified team

testCases.title: Verify pagination functionality
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=2'

testCases.title: Verify records per page functionality
steps: Verification: Expect records per page dropdown is interactive
expected: Records per page dropdown shows 25, 50 and 100 options
